labels.name: check_domain
labels.description: Check a domain: disposable/burner list membership, free-provider status, typo suggestion, MX records.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_email · Private data: check_email, check_domain · Public sink: check_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_email · Private data: check_email, check_domain · Public sink: check_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
